name: Three Onion Pie with Feta Cheese
recipeIngredient: 2 large leeks, white parts only, chopped
1 tablespoon fresh dill, or 1 tablespoon dried dill
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet.
2. Add the yellow and red onions and sauté over moderate heat for 5 minutes.
3. Stir in wine, then add leeks. Sauté another 15 minutes, stirring frequently, until onions are golden and leeks are limp.
4. Remove from heat.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. In a mixing bowl, combine beaten eggs with two tablespoons of the parsley, dill, tarragon, feta cheese, and pepper.
7. Stir in the onion mixture.
8. Oil a 10-inch tart pan and line the bottom generously with bread crumbs.
9. Pour in the onion mixture.
10. Place tomato slices around the outside edge, then sprinkle the remaining parsley in the center.
11. Sprinkle a light layer of bread crumbs over the entire top.
12. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, or until the mixture is set and the top is golden.
13. Let stand for 5 to 10 minutes before cutting into wedges.
